title: Experience Shards
description: Use Echo Shards at an Enchanting Table to store experience in a throwable item!
body:
This datapack allows you to store experience points in Echo Shards.

To begin charging an echo shard, drop it on top of an enchantment table. The shard will then absorb experience from the nearest player with any points, at 20 points per second. Each shard can carry up to 800 points, and can be given to other players by putting them in a chest.

Be careful not to drop the item, or it will explode, dealing a small amount of damage and releasing all of the experience it has absorbed.

This pack is safe to remove after it has been installed on your world, note that any charged echo shards will not explode or return experience to the player once this pack has been removed.
If you experience issues, please join my discord server and message me about it and I'll get back to you ASAP.
